name: Strigoi
damageResistances: bludgeoning piercing slashing from nonmagical weapons

traits.name: Remembered Voice
traits.description: The Strigoi speaks and moves exactly as it did in life. Creatures who knew it cannot make themselves attack it on the first round of combat — WIS save DC 12 or use movement to approach it instead of attacking.

traits.name: Home Calling
traits.description: The Strigoi can only be permanently destroyed in its home or at its grave. Destroyed elsewhere it reforms at its grave at the next moonrise.

traits.name: Invited Entry
traits.description: The Strigoi cannot enter a home uninvited. Once invited it may enter freely thereafter.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks in direct sunlight.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.description: One creature within 5ft makes DC 13 CON save or takes 2d6 necrotic and max HP reduced by same amount until long rest.

permanentDestruction: Must be staked through the heart with a wooden stake while in its home or at its grave, then decapitated, then buried with mouth filled with garlic at a crossroads. Each step separately required.
lore: Not a noble vampire. A dead thing that remembered where it lived and went home. It came back because it died wrong — no last rites, unresolved grievance, improper burial. It does not understand that it is dead. It is confused why its family treats it strangely.
campaignPlacement: Raková village, Session 1. The dead son Marek. CR 2 against level 2-3 party — manageable if they understand what it is and prepare. Unkillable if they try to fight it outside its home without knowing the destruction requirements.
